String.name: PIN_FLD_PROGRAM_NAME
String.Doc: Optional PROGRAM_NAME to record the events associated with the item_refund If the program_name is not specified the system will automatically assign "Refund Opcode" as the default.

Poid.name: PIN_FLD_BILLINFO_OBJ
Poid.Doc: either BILLINFO_OBJ or BILL_OBJ must be present since account level refund is obsolete; if not, then the default billinfo for the account will be refunded Optional AR billinfo to issue the refund against.

Poid.name: PIN_FLD_BILL_OBJ
Poid.Doc: Optional AR bill_object to issue the refund against.

Poid.name: PIN_FLD_SESSION_OBJ
Poid.Doc: Session object - session in which event took place (Usually the Refund Batch event).null means none.

Decimal.name: PIN_FLD_AMOUNT
Decimal.Doc: Optional AMOUNT for doing partial refund If this specified amount is 0 or NULL, it'll be treated as full refund; If this specified amount is beyond the refundable amount, it'll be treated as full refund. Positive value will be negated inside the opcode, so the sign doesn't matter.

String.name: PIN_FLD_ITEM_NO
String.Doc: Optional item_no for the new refund item. It not passed the opcode will generate it. This can only work if a AR billinfo or AR Bill is passed in

Substruct.name: PIN_FLD_CONTEXT_INFO
Substruct.Doc: Substruct to pass information from external clients.

String.name: PIN_FLD_CORRELATION_ID
String.Doc: Correlation id passed by an external system to BRM.

String.name: PIN_FLD_EXTERNAL_USER
String.Doc: User of an external system connecting to BRM.

Poid.name: PIN_FLD_POID
Poid.Doc: Account object against which the refund was issued.

Decimal.name: PIN_FLD_AMOUNT
Decimal.Doc: Refund amount. Incase of multi-refund item, this will be 0. Amount will be under PIN_FLD_ITEMS array.

Poid.name: PIN_FLD_ITEM_OBJ
Poid.Doc: Item obj for the new refund item. Incase of multi-refund item, this will be NULL. New refund items will be under PIN_FLD_ITEMS array.

Poid.name: PIN_FLD_POID
Poid.Doc: Item object - Refund item poid created.

Substruct.name: PIN_FLD_CONTEXT_INFO
Substruct.Doc: Substruct to pass information from external clients.

String.name: PIN_FLD_CORRELATION_ID
String.Doc: Correlation id passed by an external system to BRM.

String.name: PIN_FLD_EXTERNAL_USER
String.Doc: User of an external system connecting to BRM.
